response: The DevOps team sent an infrastructure cost alert stating that the AWS monthly bill has increased 40% month-over-month, primarily driven by new ML training jobs using $32/hr p4d instances, resulting in an estimated $45K in additional monthly costs. The team has proposed two cost-saving options—spot instances with 70% savings but interruption risk and reserved instances with 30% savings but a financial commitment—and requests a formal decision by Friday.
